data.title: 国际服违规账号封禁 #41
data.summary: [6/23 (Mon) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-g
data.body:
[6/23 (Mon) Ban Notice]
 
We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing   in-game system in Total/Grand Assault.
 
▶ Total number of players banned: 25,536
▶ Period: Permanent
▶ More details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=2982879
